supply_driver: thin safety buffer, high waste, long lead times
glm_summary: The moderate supply score of 0.6062 is primarily suppressed by weak stability (0.543) and high risk (0.565) sub-scores, driven by a dangerously thin average safety buffer of 0.35 and lengthy 3.2-day lead times. Furthermore, an elevated average waste of 3.17% restricts operational efficiency (0.615), while a near-certain stockout risk of 0.97—compounded by high demand occurring on 25.3% of days—underscores the system's vulnerability to demand spikes.
